text.p: Mount Lofty Ranges, Mid North and Murraylands districts.
The State Emergency Service advises that people should:
* Keep clear of fallen power lines.
* Beware of fallen trees or debris on the road.
* Don't drive, ride or walk through flood water.
* Keep clear of creeks and storm drains.

Warnings are also available through TV and Radio broadcasts, the Bureau's website at www.bom.gov.au or call 1300 659 210. The Bureau and State Emergency Service would appreciate warnings being broadcast regularly.

forecast-period.text: Heavy rainfall has eased across parts of northern Adelaide.

text.p: Weather Situation: A trough is moving east across the region this morning.
This warning is now cancelled. A Severe Weather Warning is current for parts of South Australia. Please check https://www.bom.gov.au/weather-and-climate/warnings-and-alerts/.
37mm of rainfall has been recorded at South Para River (Warren Reservoir) in the 2 hours to 6:53am.

hazard.text: Mount Lofty Ranges, Mid North and Murraylands

text.p: This warning is now cancelled. A Severe Weather Warning is current for parts of South Australia. Please check https://www.bom.gov.au/weather-and-climate/warnings-and-alerts/.
37mm of rainfall has been recorded at South Para River (Warren Reservoir) in the 2 hours to 6:53am.
